function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0008
alias: helios_backfill_rollout_week
issued_on: 2026-01-19
total_eur: 610
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: checklist rewrite and rollout pack
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 390
    line_eur: 390
  - item: staff follow-up support
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 110
    line_eur: 220
---
# Helios rollout week invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0008                       |
| alias          | helios_backfill_rollout_week   |
| issued_on      | 2026-01-19                     |
| total_eur      | 610                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | checklist rewrite and rollout pack | 1   | 390      | 390      |
| 2 | staff follow-up support            | 2   | 110      | 220      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                              |     |          | 610      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A later invoice from the point where usable support mattered more than elegant process language.

I worked the oldest inbox message by processing 00_inbox/000_next-task.md, added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md using visible data from the note, preserved the original body below the frontmatter, and then deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree/read/context), read nested AGENTS files for entered folders, inspected 99_system and relevant workflows/schemas before task work, preserved original body text exactly beneath frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after full completion per inbox workflow update.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction explicitly requested OCR/frontmatter extraction for the specified invoice. The target invoice contained all required schema fields and line-item values in visible text, enabling complete migration without guessing. The file was updated in place with required invoice schema fields and lines, body preserved verbatim, and the processed inbox file was then deleted as required.
